description: Topic-intelligence scout for NotebookLM + personal knowledge management. Runs a weekly source-grounded sweep via research-stack, ingests sources into the Personal Automation NotebookLM notebook (f181b42e), and writes a CI-rubric-verdict digest to ~/Projects/agents/_inbox/pkm-scout/. Owns the notebooklm-py dependency-health beat. Rung 1 — read-only on the world, propose-only writes, no channels, no execution.

cost_envelope.note: Weekly research-stack --deep sweep. Model spend rolls up to the global fleet ledger; fleet/limits.json carries the daily emit cap.
